title: Oklahoma
excerpt:
Consumer Assistance in Oklahoma

The Oklahoma Consumer Assistance Program is run by the Oklahoma Insurance Department. Staff can answer questions about health insurance regulations, rights, and responsibilities. They can help you file a complaint or appeal a health plan decision. Get consumer help with a problem or question.

Medicaid in Oklahoma

You can apply for Medicaid in Oklahoma by contacting your state Medicaid agency.

SHOP Health Insurance Marketplace® in Oklahoma

SHOP Health Insurance Marketplace® for Employees in Oklahoma

Health Insurance Marketplace® in Oklahoma

CHIP in Oklahoma

SoonerCare covers uninsured children in families with moderate incomes that are too high to qualify for Medicaid. You can find out whether your children qualify for SoonerCare right now. Fill out a Marketplace application and find out whether your children qualify. Learn more about SoonerCare in Oklahoma.
